name: mindroid
description: Mindroid JS-first Android runtime and plugin ecosystem

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @mindroid/core && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/icon-builder && npm run build --workspace mindroid && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/plugin-device-info && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/plugin-network && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/plugin-basic && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/example-vanilla && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/example-react && npm run build --workspace @mindroid/example-angular
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @mindroid/core && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @mindroid/icon-builder && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @mindroid/plugin-device-info && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @mindroid/plugin-network && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @mindroid/plugin-basic && npm pack --dry-run --workspace mindroid
